---
title: "CV"
---

## Education

| Degree | Field | Institution | Year |
|--------|-------|-------------|------|
| B.S.   | applied math | The Ohio State University | Expected 2028 |

## Experience

### Research Assistant — [Car lab]
*The Ohio State University, Feb 11, 2026 – Present*

- Brief description of your work

## Skills

- **Programming:** Python, MATLAB, etc.
- **Tools:** Git, LaTeX, etc.
